promotion.happyHour: Get 10% off instantly when you book online!

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.welcomeTitle: Welcome to SEN SPA Da Nang
aboutUs.introText: Indulge at our Sen Spa, a hidden relaxing oasis of Thai Phien street. "Sen Spa" represents the purity of body, mind, and spirit. Our name is inspired by images of lotus, maintaining a sense of tranquility within the vibrancy of Da Nang. Let your body be pampered, our therapists are trained in the use of different modalities to heal the body, nurture the mind and nourish the soul. Your eyes linger on the unique setting, taste buds tingle with warm herbal teas and your body is treated by the most professional of masseuses. We strive to provide service and product excellence, because we only give you what we would like to be served ourselves. Rest assured, this will be an extraordinary experience that will leave you longing to return time and time again.
aboutUs.mission: Continuing the mission of our sister brand, SEN SPA Da Nang was established in 2022. We offer more than just services – we provide a serene sanctuary for relaxation and rejuvenation. This Da Nang brand enhances your wellness journey with sauna and herbal bath services, alongside professional nail care and stylish nail designs.
aboutUs.description: Recharge with welcome tea and cookies, relax in our sauna or aromatic herbal baths, ease shoulder and back pain, or relax all three muscles with therapeutic body massages, complete your transformation with anti-aging facial care, scalp hair wash, or nail combos. SEN SPA Da Nang promises true revitalization, both physically and mentally, from inside and out.

businessInfo.address: 21 Thai Phien Street, Phuoc Ninh Ward, Hai Chau District, Da Nang, Vietnam

testimonials.title: What Guests are saying...
testimonials.description: We hope you enjoy reading our guests' reviews as much as ours. To all of us at SEN SPA Da Nang, this means more than anything else.
